title: beta vulgaris var. hortensis
intro: Beta vulgaris var. hortensis, also known as garden beet or sugar beet, is a variety of beet plant that is cultivated for its edible leaves and roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Beta vulgaris var. hortensis include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as a natural detoxifier. Herbal preparations of the plant include juice, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including anemia, digestive issues, and skin problems.
